title: All One Data Structure
hints: Track counts with a hash map, but you need fast access to min/max counts. How can you group keys by their current count?
Use a second map linking each count value to a set of keys having that count. This lets you find min/max counts and resolve ties efficiently.
Maintain pointers to the current min and max count values. When counts change, update these pointers by checking if the old min/max sets become empty.
